details.notes: Replaced @binding(13) dataTextureA with @binding(7) dataTextureA. Remapped historyBuf/unusedBuf/historyTex to standard dataTextureA/B/C bindings. Pass 1 writes volumetric data to dataTextureA.

Replaced @binding(13) dataTextureA with @binding(9) dataTextureC for reading Pass 1 data. Updated textureLoad to use dataTextureC. Updated temporal feedback to write to @binding(7) dataTextureA and sample from @binding(9) dataTextureC.
Replaced @binding(13) dataTextureA with @binding(7) dataTextureA. Remapped historyBuf/unusedBuf/historyTex to standard dataTextureA/B/C bindings. Pass 1 writes volumetric data to dataTextureA.

Replaced @binding(13) dataTextureA with @binding(9) dataTextureC for reading Pass 1 data. Updated textureLoad to use dataTextureC. Updated temporal feedback to write to @binding(7) dataTextureA and sample from @binding(9) dataTextureC.
Replaced @binding(13) dataTextureA with @binding(7) dataTextureA. Remapped historyBuf/unusedBuf/historyTex to standard dataTextureA/B/C bindings. Pass 1 writes field data to dataTextureA.

Replaced @binding(13) dataTextureA (input) with @binding(9) dataTextureC. Replaced @binding(14) dataTextureB (output) with @binding(8) dataTextureB. Updated textureLoad to use dataTextureC. Updated temporal feedback to write to @binding(7) dataTextureA and sample from @binding(9) dataTextureC.

Replaced @binding(13) dataTextureB with @binding(9) dataTextureC for reading Pass 2 data. Remapped historyBuf/unusedBuf/historyTex to standard dataTextureA/B/C bindings. Updated textureLoad and textureSampleLevel calls to use dataTextureC.

summary: All 7 multi-pass shaders have been fixed to use only valid bindings 0-12. The fix follows the standard data texture convention: Pass 1 writes to dataTextureA (binding 7), Pass 2 reads from dataTextureC (binding 9) which contains Pass 1's output, and Pass 2 writes to dataTextureB (binding 8). Temporal feedback has been remapped to use dataTextureA for writing history and dataTextureC for reading history.
